feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: life is worth the ride (the ride is worth the fall)
entry.summary:
Author: heliadae

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,389Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: Clark froze. "You… you heard him?" "Yeah," Jason nodded weakly. "Everything was hurting. And it was so loud. And then… then everything went black. But I heard him. I heard B calling my name. He was screaming it." Jason let out a shaky breath, leaning his head against Clark’s chest. "I knew he'd come. I knew he wouldn't let me die."

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Forever in debt to priceless advice
entry.summary:
Author: capricious_Bastard

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,459Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 18

Summary: There's a hush that befalls the city. Time has stopped for a moment as the big screens at Gotham Square flicker. Like a corrupted tape that's been stitched and Frankenstein-ed together. And they all watch as their heart falls.

entry.title: In the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,054Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 13

Summary: Bruce Wayne has known there was something wrong with him from a very young age. It was a sickness, something to bury deep rather than confront, something hidden that could never be allowed to come to light. Now, faced with disturbing feelings about his best friend and a killer targeting gay people in Gotham, this secret sickness might just start eating him alive.

entry.title: [Podfic] ship-to-ship combat
entry.summary:
Author: DevilWithABirdDress

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 330Chapters: 10/13Kudos: 82

Summary: Clark, in an attempt to make some spare cash, unintentionally stumbles into the world of superhero fanfiction, becomes a prolific writer for Gotham's OTP, and tries his best to fend off rival fans who want him to convert to superbat instead.Podfic of ship-to-ship combat by pomeloquat.

entry.title: A Little Sunshine
entry.summary:
Author: LuminescentWoollyBear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,055Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 52

Summary: An alien appears in Metropolis and Bruce doesn't know what to do about it. Even more concerning, Bruce breaks his promise to himself to avoid unnecessary attachments and starts developing feelings for his new friend, Clark. But he just can't help gravitating towards the earnest kindness and protective warmth of the other. If he isn't careful, Bruce might even start trusting him. ~~~ None of them are prominent, but this fic does include some non-superbat ships to various degrees, including: Bruce/Other, Bruce/Selina Kyle

entry.title: The Screwups and Clark Kent
entry.summary:
Author: Fururun

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,043Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: Bruce and Clark agreed to ask each other's families to marry. It's not a requirement, but it's just nice to have a large group of superheroes to be on the same page.When Bruce goes to the Superfamily expecting an easy answer, he collides with the hurdle named Supergirl.

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 97,983Chapters: 19/30Kudos: 573

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: I Used To Obsess Over Living, Now I Only Obsess Over You
entry.summary:
Author: l0s3rzclub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,792Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 168

Summary: Clark, of course, knew that Bruce Wayne had been studying at Metropolis University. The billionaire was all anyone could talk about when he first got accepted. Except for Clark. He'd actually counted himself lucky to never run into the guy. From the sounds of it, Bruce was just another rich kid with a superiority complex. ______ OR: Enemies to Lovers College AU because it's so fucking good.

entry.title: You were the last of your kind (all of the blame's mine)
entry.summary:
Author: choedclare

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,975Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: This is a love story. From the very beginning, Bruce has never approved of Superman. They are two sides of the same coin, in the way they both wish to do good, but would go about it in such different ways. They are parallel lines. This is a love story. Then comes the attack on Jarhanpur. It changes things; it makes Bruce angrier, and Superman more impulsive. It is a reinforcement of the fact that they do not make sense in any way. Ultimately, this is a love story.

entry.title: And I'll Do It Over Again (Hopefully Better This Time)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,575Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 657

Summary: If you told one Damian Wayne he’d find a small, pit-touched child shivering under an overpass in a pool of what appeared to be Lazarus water tainted only by rainwater and blood, he’d probably question your sanity. Of course, he’d keep what you’d said in mind, but ultimately regard the notion as the nonsensical babbling of an unstable fool. After all, people, especially children, don’t just bleed Pit waters. But that’s exactly what he’s looking at, isn’t it?

entry.title: Surrender
entry.summary:
Author: pusheenlover69

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 715Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: "I'm too tired to fight this anymore." Clark froze in place, lowering until his bright red boots made contact with the concrete roof below announced by a soft tap. "I've fallen for you Kal. When I'm without you, I'm no more than a prisoner to the longing that engulfs my heart." He hangs his head and grips his hand over his heart. or Batman reluctantly confesses to Superman on a Metropolis rooftop.

entry.title: Two Months In Kansas
entry.summary:
Author: Superbat_fan02

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,462Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 86

Summary: Alfred forces Bruce to spend two months on vacation in Kansas, a small, sparsely populated town, to give him a break from his grueling training and the mental exhaustion of spending almost every night at his computer reading thousands of Gotham police reports. On this short trip, Bruce meets Clark, a boy a year younger than him who is his complete opposite. Clark is cheerful, honest, empathetic, and responsible. The golden boy of Kansas, always with a smile and a pleasant tone of voice. But Bruce doesn’t believe that’s the whole story. Clark lives on and grew up on the farm where there are reports of a UFO crash, and, mysteriously, his “parents”—who weren’t parents at the time—are now his parents. Was it really a coincidence that Clark appeared after this supposed UFO news? Furthermore, not to mention that Bruce was already considered tall and well-built for his age, Clark was even taller and bigger than him. He always seemed to hear more than he intended to, or would carelessly lift objects that would be a challenge even for adults to lift. Bruce was sure of it—there was something about Clark, and he wanted to find out what it was.

entry.title: The Detective’s Greatest Blindspot
entry.summary:
Author: Tigerphoenix

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,297Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 119

Summary: While he just wants Superman to stay on his side of the bay, Bruce encounters reporter Clark Kent at a gala, who calls Bruce out on his "Brucie" act. What starts as a tense "what are you hiding?" case turns into a genuine connection, where Bruce is so convinced that Clark Kent and the alien savior of Metropolis could never be the same person, he misses Clark's biggest secret. Then disaster strikes. In a Superman fight, the Daily Planet is destroyed, and witnesses say Clark was inside. Clark is dead—Superman's negligence killed him—and it has turned the Bat into a hunter, looking for a way to make the god pay for killing the best man he had ever known.

entry.title: Title of your Sex Tape
entry.summary:
Author: miryum

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 80,677Chapters: 23/23Kudos: 724

Summary: And then there was one. Y/n L/n. Dick sighed heavily, preparing himself for the shenanigans she would surely have gotten herself into. Dick’s gaze swept to the desk opposite Jason’s but… Y/n was sitting in her seat, cataloguing evidence. Dick’s mouth fell open. It was a miracle!  Detective!Jason Todd x detective!Reader based on Jake and Amy's relationship

entry.title: Do I really mean anything to you?
entry.summary:
Author: Justsometheaterkid

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 736Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 38

Summary: After the party Tim and his family talk leading to Tim finding out something that makes him question if he meant anything to the man he loves

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
